The New York Knicks assigned Jerome Jordan to the Erie BayHawks of the G-League.
The Golden State Warriors assigned Chris Wright to the Dakota Wizards of the G-League.
The Houston Rockets signed Diamon Simpson to a contract for the rest of the season.
The Charlotte Bobcats signed Jamario Moon to a contract for the rest of the season.
The Cleveland Cavaliers recalled Luke Harangody from the Canton Charge of the G-League.
The Cleveland Cavaliers assigned Luke Harangody to the Canton Charge of the G-League.
The Washington Wizards signed Morris Almond as a free agent.
The Washington Wizards waived Roger Mason .
The Golden State Warriors signed Mikki Moore as a free agent.
The Golden State Warriors recalled Chris Wright from the Dakota Wizards of the G-League.
The New York Knicks recalled Jerome Jordan from the Erie BayHawks of the G-League.
The New Orleans Hornets signed Darryl Watkins to a 10-day contract.
The New Orleans Hornets waived Chris Johnson .
The Cleveland Cavaliers recalled Luke Harangody from the Canton Charge of the G-League.
The Boston Celtics signed Sean Williams as a free agent.
The Boston Celtics waived Jermaine O'Neal .
The New York Knicks signed Dan Gadzuric as a free agent.
The New York Knicks waived Henry Walker .
The Memphis Grizzlies signed Lester Hudson as a free agent.
The Cleveland Cavaliers signed D.J. Kennedy as a free agent.
The Los Angeles Clippers recalled Travis Leslie from the Bakersfield Jam of the G-League.
The Philadelphia 76ers signed Xavier Silas as a free agent.
The San Antonio Spurs signed Derrick Byars as a free agent.
The Los Angeles Lakers recalled Christian Eyenga from the Los Angeles D-Fenders of the G-League.
The San Antonio Spurs recalled Cory Joseph from the Austin Toros of the G-League.
The Los Angeles Lakers assigned Christian Eyenga to the Los Angeles D-Fenders of the G-League.
The Los Angeles Lakers recalled Christian Eyenga from the Los Angeles D-Fenders of the G-League.
The New Orleans Hornets traded Trevor Ariza and Emeka Okafor to the Washington Wizards for Rashard Lewis and a 2012 2nd round draft pick ( Darius Miller was later selected).
The Houston Rockets traded Chase Budinger and Lior Eliyahu to the Minnesota Timberwolves for a 2012 1st round draft pick ( Terrence Jones was later selected).
The Charlotte Bobcats traded Corey Maggette to the Detroit Pistons for Ben Gordon and a 2014 1st round draft pick ( Noah Vonleh was later selected).

The Houston Rockets traded Samuel Dalembert , cash, a 2012 1st round draft pick ( John Henson was later selected) and a 2014 2nd round draft pick ( Nemanja Dangubić was later selected) to the Milwaukee Bucks for Jon Brockman , Jon Leuer , Shaun Livingston and a 2012 1st round draft pick ( Jeremy Lamb was later selected).

The Miami Heat traded Arnett Moultrie to the Philadelphia 76ers for Justin Hamilton , a 2015 2nd round draft pick ( Jordan Mickey was later selected) and a 2016 2nd round draft pick ( Deyonta Davis was later selected).
The Indiana Pacers traded cash to the Sacramento Kings for Orlando Johnson .
The Cleveland Cavaliers traded Jae Crowder , Jared Cunningham and Bernard James to the Dallas Mavericks for Kelenna Azubuike and Tyler Zeller .
The New Jersey Nets traded cash to the Philadelphia 76ers for Tornike Shengelia .
The Dallas Mavericks traded Darius Johnson-Odom to the Los Angeles Lakers for cash.
The New Jersey Nets traded cash to the Portland Trail Blazers for Tyshawn Taylor .

In a 4-team trade, the Dallas Mavericks traded Lamar Odom to the Los Angeles Clippers ; the Dallas Mavericks traded Shan Foster to the Utah Jazz ; the Houston Rockets traded cash to the Dallas Mavericks ; the Los Angeles Clippers traded Furkan Aldemir to the Houston Rockets ; the Los Angeles Clippers traded Mo Williams to the Utah Jazz ; and the Utah Jazz traded Tadija Dragićević to the Dallas Mavericks .
The New Orleans Hornets waived Rashard Lewis .

The Sacramento Kings hired Michael Malone as Head Coach.
